entities.name: SOIL WATER AVAILABILITY
entities.description: The amount of water available in the soil, a major determinant for rainfed crop success

entities.name: RAINFED
entities.description: Agricultural condition where crops rely on rainfall

entities.name: RAINFALL
entities.description: Precipitation that influences soil water availability

entities.name: WATBAL
entities.description: A water balance model used to assess soil water availability scenarios

entities.name: GIS
entities.description: Geographic Information Systems used to display and analyze soil water availability maps

entities.name: SUSTAINABILITY
entities.description: The ability of cropping systems to maintain productivity

entities.name: CROP DIVERSIFICATION
entities.description: The practice of increasing the variety of crops grown in a system

entities.name: CROPPING SYSTEMS
entities.description: The pattern of crops grown on a piece of land, such as rice or wheat-based systems

entities.name: LENGTH OF GROWING SEASON
entities.description: The duration of time available for crop growth based on water availability

entities.name: CLIMATIC DATA
entities.description: Monthly, daily, or weekly weather data used as input for water balance models

entities.name: IRRIGATION SCHEDULING
entities.description: The process of planning water application for irrigated crops
